title: Logroño, La Rioja — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Logroño, La Rioja: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Logroño is a city in La Rioja with a population of 152,000. The capital of La Rioja wine region, famous for its Calle Laurel tapas bars, excellent wines, and a lively culinary scene.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
